title: rubus exstans
intro: Rubus exstans, also known as the black thimbleberry, is a type of shrub that belongs to the rose family and is native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The medicinal properties of Rubus exstans include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Rubus exstans include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide protection against certain types of cancer. Rubus exstans can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
